en: After we made contact with the engineers, the Prometheus was destroyed.
ko: 엔지니어들과 접촉한 후, 프로메테우스호는 파괴됐어요.

en: All hands were lost, but I escaped with Elizabeth in one of their ships.
ko: 모든 승무원이 목숨을 잃었지만, 저는 엘리자베스와 함께 그들의 우주선 중 하나로 탈출했어요.

en: I was badly injured on our mission.
ko: 임무 중에 심하게 다쳤어요.

en: I was born in a country where anything was possible.
ko: 뭐든지 가능한 나라에서 태어났어요.

en: We celebrated simple freedoms, to live and to love.
ko: 단순한 자유를 축하했어요, 살고 사랑하는 것을.

en: When I was 10, my father decided who I should marry.
ko: 내가 10살 때 아버지가 내 결혼 상대를 정했어.

en: This is your wife. I have a wife?
ko: 이 사람이 네 아내야. 내가 아내가 있다고?

en: But I was in love with the girl next door.
ko: 근데 난 옆집 여자를 사랑했어.

en: I work all my life, I didn't have any food when I was a kid.
ko: 평생 일했어, 어렸을 때 먹을 것도 없었고.

en: I'm hungry, I don't want to be hungry anymore.
ko: 배고파, 더 이상 배고프기 싫어.

en: What the hell happened here? It was a fight.
ko: 여기서 대체 무슨 일이 있었어? 싸움이었어.

en: One guy took them all down with his bare hands.
ko: 한 놈이 맨손으로 다 쓰러뜨렸어.

en: He's still in there.
ko: 아직 안에 있어.

en: So, this was your husband? No, I mean, he was just a boyfriend.
ko: 그래서, 이 사람이 남편이었어요? 아뇨, 그러니까, 그냥 남자친구였어요.

en: It never really went anywhere. You were at work when the victim died?
ko: 진전된 건 없었어요. 피해자가 사망했을 때 직장에 계셨나요?

en: I was fired today. Wow, you are having a bad day.
ko: 오늘 해고됐어요. 와, 오늘 진짜 안 좋은 날이네요.

en: Right? I was born and raised in Brooklyn.
ko: 그렇죠? 전 브루클린에서 나고 자랐어요.

en: My father was a security guard for over 32 years.
ko: 아버지는 32년 넘게 경비원이셨어요.

en: Ten years ago in Raccoon City, there was an outbreak.
ko: 10년 전 라쿤시티에서 발병 사태가 있었어.

en: It spread across the world within days.
ko: 며칠 만에 전 세계로 퍼졌지.

en: One way or another, our world is coming to an end.
ko: 어떻게든, 우리 세계는 끝나가고 있어.

en: How did you get into financial consulting?
ko: 금융 컨설팅은 어떻게 시작하게 됐어요?

en: How did you get into financial consulting?
ko: 금융 컨설팅은 어떻게 시작하게 됐어요?

en: My dad was an accountant. You know, he had the whole shtick.
ko: 아버지가 회계사였어요. 있잖아요, 뭐 그런 전형적인 스타일.

en: The dorky pocket protector. I have a pocket protector.
ko: 촌스러운 호주머니 보호대. 나도 호주머니 보호대 있는데.

en: That's a nice one. They're still on us.
ko: 좋은 거네요. 아직 쫓아오고 있어.

en: These guys are taking this person. You were only supposed to create a diversion, Roman.
ko: 이놈들이 이 사람을 데려가고 있어. 주의만 끌기로 했잖아, 로만.

en: That was complete destruction. What you want from me?
ko: 그건 완전 파괴였잖아. 나한테 뭘 바라는 거야?

en: I'm Roman Pierce, man. It's what I do.
ko: 나 로만 피어스야. 이게 내 스타일이야.

en: Can you tell me where you were Friday night?
ko: 금요일 밤에 어디 계셨는지 말씀해주시겠어요?

en: I was in the city, and then I went to visit my husband.
ko: 시내에 있었고, 그다음에 남편을 만나러 갔어요.

en: You mean your ex-husband?
ko: 전남편 말씀이시죠?

en: It's my understanding that the woman who has gone missing was his nanny.
ko: 실종된 여성이 그의 보모였던 걸로 알고 있습니다.

en: I want to go to Mars. I wrote those words when I was 12 years old.
ko: 화성에 가고 싶어. 12살 때 그 말을 적었어.

en: Mars is a planet ready for life.
ko: 화성은 생명체를 위한 준비가 된 행성이야.

en: Tell me where you're really from. Mars. I was born here.
ko: 진짜 어디서 왔는지 말해줘. 화성. 나 여기서 태어났어.

en: Sometimes I feel like I'm from a different planet, too.
ko: 가끔은 나도 다른 행성에서 온 것 같아.

en: Sophia was a beautiful orphan. Chosen by one of the richest men in the city.
ko: 소피아는 아름다운 고아였어. 도시에서 가장 부유한 남자 중 한 명이 선택했지.

en: Love, honor, and obey.
ko: 사랑하고, 존경하고, 순종할 것을.

en: I was terrified to meet you. You're perfect.
ko: 널 만나는 게 무서웠어. 넌 완벽해.

en: All the time. Thank you.
ko: 항상. 고마워.
